item.title: Iraq clears obstacle to ExxonMobil oilfield development contract
item.description: Baghdad says its outstanding claims of historical unpaid taxes will not block supermajor's return to the country

item.title: UK fines Petrofac unit for Russia sanctions breach
item.description: Energy contractor provided sanctioned goods to people connected to Russia, HMRC says

item.title: Eni and XRG enter three Vaca Muerta blocks to supply Argentina LNG
item.description: Deal establishes upstream participation in major LNG project in South America

item.title: Eni, XRG enter three Vaca Muerta blocks to supply Argentina LNG
item.description: Deal establishes upstream participation in major LNG project in South America

item.title: UK's likely next prime minister calls to safeguard domestic energy
item.description: UK could have a new prime minister in as little as three weeks

item.title: Iraq denies Opec exit reports but seeks higher long term production quota
item.description: Baghdad has called for the re-assessment of cartel's production ceilings

item.title: Output curbed at Kazakhstan's third largest oilfield after Ukraine hits Russian plant
item.description: Gazprom-operated Orenburg plant processes associated gas that is produced together with oil at Karachaganak

item.title: Petrobras lays out new subsea plan to avoid being ‘cornered’ by suppliers
item.description: Company seeking PLV as alternative strategy for rigid riser installation offshore Brazil

item.title: SBM Offshore orders new hull for large FPSO
item.description: FPSO company goes with favoured yard in China for its 13th Fast4Ward hull

item.title: Major hydrocarbon release being investigated at Canada platform
item.description: More than 1500 litres of oil released in incident classed as having potential for fire, explosion and fatality

item.title: SBM secures $465 million of finance for Mexico vessel
item.description: Funding covers Trion field's floating storage and offloading vessel and includes partial insurance cover from a Chinese corporation.

item.title: Eni starts-up Libya gas compression project
item.description: Sabratha scheme aims to boost Libya’s energy security and support gas exports to Italy

item.title: Namibia farm-out deal cleared by government
item.description: Namibian player secures control of Walvis basin licence from Eco Atlantic

item.title: Deepwater drillers complete merger
item.description: Merged company combines Vantage's operational experience with Eldorado's commercial strength

item.title: Blaze onboard Petronas facility offshore Malaysia
item.description: No injuries reported from Sunday's fire on West Lutong Vent asset off the coast of Sarawak

item.title: 14 dead in Aramco helicopter tragedy
item.description: Investigation underway after Sunday's fatal crash

item.title: Chiyoda in global engineering and procurement pact with Shell
item.description: Japanese engineering specialist deepens collaboration with UK heavyweight after more than half a century

item.title: Santos deprioritises Poseidon giant gas and LNG project
item.description: Jobs to be cut in Western Australia as independent focuses on other domestic assets

item.title: Adnoc Gas launches tender for $8 billion gas cap project
item.description: Bab Gas Cap gas plant package involves at least two processing trains, each capable of handling more than 900 million cubic feet per day of gas

item.title: Spanner in the works for Mubadala's giant gas project
item.description: Provincial government wants Tangkulo's gas to be processed onshore not onboard the FPSO

item.title: Germany calls for 'urgent revision' of EU methane rules
item.description: European Union methane regulations due to come into force in January 2027

item.title: TotalEnergies and Petronas spud frontier deepwater exploration well
item.description: Mailu prospect is under way in Papua New Guinea

item.title: TotalEnergies and Petronas drill frontier deepwater exploration well
item.description: Mailu prospect is under way in Papua New Guinea

item.title: Equinor quits another offshore wind market after abandoning renewables target
item.description: Norwegian oil giant recently scrapped its target for wind and solar deployment and raised its bar for investing in new renewables projects

item.title: Chinese company wins Middle East drill string supply contract
item.description: Hilong subsidiary will supply drill strings for 19 onshore and offshore rigs

item.title: Angola's give and take could be key to unlocking neglected discoveries
item.description: Slew of legacy deepwater oil finds remain untouched

item.title: Norway contractor rides wave of Vaar awards with SURF deal
item.description: Ocean Installer to provide SURF workscope on next Balder phase

item.title: Aker Solutions extends long tenure with Canadian operator
item.description: Norwegian contractor has been supporting Cenovus for many years

item.title: Australian joint venture lifts resources estimate ahead of offshore drilling
item.description: Latest seismic reprocessing delivers 92% boost to Bedout basin JV’s prospects offshore Australia

item.title: PTTEP advancing FLNG project to start-up in 2027
item.description: Petronas' PFLNG Dua vessel to exploit Permai, Bemban and Alum fields offshore Sabah
